# Code of Conduct

## Our Commitment

This project is committed to a welcoming, respectful, and constructive environment for everyone.

## Expected Behavior

- Be respectful and professional in technical discussion.
- Focus on reproducible facts, code, and test evidence.
- Assume good intent and discuss disagreements in good faith.
- Keep feedback actionable and scoped to the problem.

## Unacceptable Behavior

- Harassment, insults, personal attacks, or discriminatory language.
- Repeated disruptive behavior after maintainer direction.
- Deliberate sabotage, spam, or malicious abuse of project workflows.

## Enforcement

Project maintainers are responsible for clarifying and enforcing this policy. Maintainers may remove or restrict comments, issues, or contributions that violate this code.

## Scope

This policy applies to project spaces including issues, pull requests, and discussions.
